races.name: Elf
races.description:
"Far greater is the admiration I harbor for the elves..."

- Y. Mageshell, Manyhals of Death

The tall and slender elves were born into magic...
races.biology: Elves reach adulthood at the age of 15. They have the rare luxury of both time and patience. They can live up to 750 years.

subraces.name: Dark Elf
subraces.description: Dark Elves are natural to the frozen tundras of Nyjörsa. Physically tall and slender, they tend to be the bulkiest of the elves.

subraces.name: Imperial Elf
subraces.description: Raised only to serve the emperor. Their long ears are a symbol of virtue and power.

subraces.name: Light Elf
subraces.description: Descendants of the elves that chose not to join the empire. They call themselves light elves due to their enlightened decisions.

subraces.name: Night Elf
subraces.description: The first elves in Faleria. Their magic has attuned with nature, transforming their bodies to resemble tree trunks.

feat_dark_elf_shadowborn.name: Shadowborn
feat_dark_elf_shadowborn.description: You know the *Control Flames* cantrip. Starting at 3rd level, you can cast *Ice Knife*. Starting at 5th level, you can cast *Darkness*.

feat_imperial_elf_highborn.name: Highborn
feat_imperial_elf_highborn.description: You know the *True Strike* cantrip. Starting at 3rd level, you can cast *Wrathful Smite*. Starting at 5th level, you can cast *Crown of Madness*.

feat_light_elf_lightborn.name: Lightborn
feat_light_elf_lightborn.description: You know the *Light* cantrip. Starting at 3rd level, you can cast *Faerie Fire*. Starting at 5th level, you can cast *Invisibility*.

feat_night_elf_oakborn.name: Oakborn
feat_night_elf_oakborn.description: You know the *Druidcraft* cantrip. Starting at 3rd level, you can cast *Entangle*. Starting at 5th level, you can cast *Moonbeam*.

feat_elf_darkvision.name: Darkvision
feat_elf_darkvision.description: You can see in dim light within 18 meters as if it were bright light.

feat_elf_keen_senses.name: Keen Senses
feat_elf_keen_senses.description: You have proficiency in the Perception skill.

feat_elf_researchers.name: Arcane Researchers
feat_elf_researchers.description: You have advantage on Intelligence (Arcana) checks to identify magic items.
